Itâs the busiest time of year, but in between your social catch-ups and Chrissy shopping, here's a few events you should check out.

22 Nov: Sapori at Tailors presents Giadas Wine Masterclass 
22 Nov: Crafted Beer Festival 
22 Nov: Visions: Through the Eyes of a Palestinian Prisoner
22 & 29 Nov: Jazz @ The Pav
23 Nov: Sixty: A Celebration in Sound
24-30 Nov: ButterBoy Pop-Up
28 Nov: The Pav & Glandore Wines Long Lunch
28 Nov-14 Dec: Christmas in the City

30 Nov: Tighes Hill Tipple
30 Nov: It's Our House

Newcastleâs inaugural Bar Awards have officially been announced and asÂ you areÂ one of our cityâs go-to hospitality venues, we need your nominations!

Bar Awards will bring together those who energise the cityâs bar and drink scene, with awards presented across 11 categories:
